patient_summary:
• 73/Female patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus
• Key Procedures: Ancillary procedure at LGH KISSEL HILL
• Active Meds: 2 medications including Atorvastatin, insulin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Glucose 199 (H); GFR 50 (A); BUN 37 (H)
• Key History: Former smoker, Cigarettes 0.3 packs/day 03/22/1971 - 03/22/1973
